steps.title: Link LINE activity to cognition
steps.content: The hypothesis is that LINE transposons are tied to advanced cognition. Human LINE transposons are important in the hippocampus, a structure supporting complex cognition, so support would show similar LINE activity in an octopus brain structure with a similar function.

steps.title: Reject evidence without cognition
steps.content:
• Choice B only adds more information about humans and does not connect octopus LINE transposons to cognition.
  • Choice C discusses copy numbers and corruption, not brain function.
  • Choice D compares brain size and transposon variety without showing LINE activity tied to cognition.
The answer is A.
